prompt: Pull the US IG and US HY excess return indices from January 2015 to today, on a weekly frequency. I want cumulative index values (base 100), not YTD percentages. Save the result to a CSV. Write me the Python code.
assertions: The code fetches LUACTRUU Index and LF98TRUU Index with INDEX_EXCESS_RETURN_YTD field
The code converts YTD percent returns to cumulative chain-linked indices (not raw YTD values)
The code sets weekly periodicity (W or WEEKLY)
The code uses January 2015 as the start date
The code saves the output to a CSV file with UTF-8 encoding
